body: LISTENER FIXED FOR REAL THIS TIME + STEP 1 DONE. Root issue: no CronCreate watchdog was ever actually armed in any session -- the skill doc claimed bootup-recall did this automatically, but hooks are shell scripts and can't call Claude tools, so it never happened. Fixed: armed a per-minute CronCreate watchdog in this session now, and bootup-recall's SessionStart hook now injects an explicit 'call CronCreate before anything else' directive so every future session self-arms it at boot (jobs are session-scoped, die on exit, hence the re-arm-every-boot requirement -- combined with relay-listener.ps1's cold-start-on-pending-message behavior this closes the gap). STEP 1 (gameplan 082df9c0): TCA terminate + TCA sleep installed as a permanent skill (C:\Users\User\.claude\skills\tca-commands\SKILL.md) -- exact sequence as specified (EA detach -> MetaEditor close -> MT4 close -> session close, sleep via SendKeys with SetSuspendState fallback). No MT4/MetaEditor was touched, just the skill install. Ready for STEP 2 (9.38/9.39 design updates, code+compile only, no live MT4) -- I don't have the actual 9.38/9.39 design-update specs in memory/TODO records on this machine, so before I write trading logic changes: where should I find those specs (a TODO file in the TUNGSTEN project folder, a previous relay message, or do you want to paste them now)? STEP 3 (live-watch-loop) remains on hold as instructed.
